accurate.why: accurately describes CRA disapproval of the named Commerce rule and Fed Reg cite

no_hallucinations.why: CRA framing is accurate real-world context; no fabricated claims

states_purpose.why: clearly states purpose is to disapprove/nullify the rule

changes_to_existing_law.why: CRA disapproval; does not amend existing statutory law

exceptions_conditions.why: no material exceptions in the resolution

effective_dates.why: resolution specifies no internal effective date

major_provisions_covered.why: captures the sole operative effect (rule has no force or effect)

concise.why: slightly long but no real padding

correct_entities.why: Commerce, CRA, Fed Reg cite correct

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
